bolt.directive: Maintain the current performance baseline. Defer any new optimization tasks until pending architectural shifts and critical validation debts are fully resolved.

palette.directive: URGENT: Execute the pending validation task immediately. Thoroughly verify that journal logs are consistently clear and highly accessible for strictly sandboxed services (neos-autoupdate.service, neos-liveuser-setup.service). Ensure the recent permission restrictions absolutely do not degrade debugging capabilities.

sentinel.directive: URGENT: Execute the pending validation task immediately. Conduct a rigorous, uncompromising audit of the systemd sandboxing configurations in neos-autoupdate.service and neos-liveuser-setup.service. Ensure strictly zero unnecessary privileges are granted, and thoroughly validate that ReadWritePaths directives remain strictly minimal and entirely fit for purpose.

note: Critical, immediate directives mandated by the No-build day (strategic pause) to aggressively clear accumulating validation debt from the newly applied strict sandboxing. No further development will proceed until these tasks are verified complete.
